title: Morning Sparkle Routine
description: Start the day with a fresh face! Apply kid-friendly makeup to get ready for adventures.

title: Diwali Rangoli Magic
description: Create a beautiful rangoli design in the garden to celebrate Diwali with colors and patterns!

title: Holi Color Splash
description: Gather colors and play Holi with friends in the park! Spread joy and rainbow fun everywhere.

title: Gol Gappe Chef
description: Learn to make yummy gol gappe in the kitchen! Fill the puris with spicy pani and serve them up.

title: Viral Reel Star
description: Create an awesome dance reel to post on social media! Choose a cool background and show your moves.

title: Karate White Belt Test
description: Practice your basic kata moves and earn your first karate belt! Show discipline and focus.

title: Cotton Candy Cloud Hunt
description: Find the cotton candy stand at the amusement park and collect the fluffiest pink treat!

title: Frooti Party Time
description: Invite your friends for a refreshing Frooti party! Collect mango drinks and share the fun.

title: Popcorn Chicken Cook-Off
description: Compete in a cooking contest to make the crispiest popcorn chicken! Beat the clock and win.

title: Feed Whiskers
description: Your kitty is hungry! Go to the kitchen and prepare a tasty meal for Whiskers.

title: Garden Harvest Festival
description: The vegetables are ready! Harvest tomatoes, carrots, and flowers from your beautiful garden.

title: Mall Adventure Day
description: Explore the mall with Ava! Ride the escalators, window shop, and grab snacks at the food court.

title: Arcade High Score Hero
description: Beat the high score on your favorite arcade game and collect tickets for prizes!

title: Claw Machine Champion
description: Win a cute plushie from the claw machine at the arcade! It takes skill and patience.

title: Ferris Wheel Dreams
description: Ride the magical ferris wheel at the amusement park and enjoy the view from the top!

title: Bumper Car Bash
description: Challenge your friends to a bumper car battle! Bump and zoom around the arena.

title: Roller Coaster Brave
description: Be brave and ride the roller coaster! Scream with joy as you zoom through loops and drops.

title: Chai Time with Friends
description: Brew a perfect cup of masala chai and share it with your friends in the garden.

title: Dance-Off with Ava
description: Challenge your bestie Ava to an epic dance battle! Show your best moves and win.

title: YouTube Marathon
description: Cozy up in the living room and watch your favorite YouTube videos on the big TV!

title: Karate Yellow Belt Journey
description: Train hard and master new kata moves to earn your yellow belt! Focus and discipline are key.

title: Nail Art Party
description: Paint your nails with sparkly colors and create cute designs for a nail art party!

title: French Fry Feast
description: Cook up a batch of crispy golden french fries and share them with Buddy the dog!

title: School Art Project
description: Work with Mia on a creative art project for school! Gather supplies and make something amazing.

title: Playground Fun
description: Meet friends at the playground for swings, slides, and lots of laughter!

title: Diwali Diya Decoration
description: Decorate beautiful diyas with colors and glitter to light up your home for Diwali!

title: Walk Buddy the Dog
description: Take Buddy for a walk in the park! He needs exercise and loves to explore.

title: Merry-Go-Round Magic
description: Ride the colorful merry-go-round at the amusement park and pick your favorite horse!

title: Candy Collection Spree
description: Collect different types of candies from around town! Sweet treats await everywhere.

title: Reel Scroll Session
description: Grab your tablet and scroll through fun reels for inspiration! Find trending dances.

title: Fashion Show Star
description: Organize a fashion show in the living room! Pick outfits and strut your stuff on the runway.

title: Bunny Cuddle Time
description: Spend quality time with Cotton the bunny! Give pets, treats, and lots of love.

title: Carnival Ring Toss
description: Win prizes at the carnival ring toss game! Aim carefully and toss those rings.

title: Lipstick Makeover
description: Try on different lip colors and find your perfect shade for today's adventures!

title: Help Leo Study
description: Leo needs help with homework! Be a good friend and study together at school.

title: Escalator Explorer
description: Ride all the escalators in the mall! Up and down, it's like a mini adventure.

title: Holi Thandai Treat
description: Make refreshing thandai drink for Holi celebrations! A cool treat for a colorful day.

title: Ticket Redemption Pro
description: Collect enough arcade tickets to redeem an awesome prize from the prize counter!

title: Plant Sunflowers
description: Plant beautiful sunflower seeds in the garden and watch them grow tall and bright!

title: Trendy Dance Tutorial
description: Learn a new trendy dance from watching videos and practice until you nail it!

title: Karate Orange Belt Challenge
description: Master advanced kicks and punches to earn your orange belt! Train with dedication.

title: Food Court Feast
description: Visit the mall food court and try different yummy foods! So many choices.

title: Mia's Art Gallery
description: Help Mia set up an art gallery in the garden! Display paintings and invite guests.

title: Desi Street Food Tour
description: Explore and collect different desi street foods! From samosas to chaat, taste them all.

title: Treasure Hunt Adventure
description: Follow clues around the house to find hidden treasure! X marks the spot.

title: Window Shopping Spree
description: Explore all the shop windows at the mall! Dream about all the pretty things.

title: Glitter Eyeshadow Glam
description: Apply sparkly eyeshadow for a glamorous look! Perfect for a special day out.

title: Best Friend Bracelet
description: Make matching friendship bracelets for you and Ava! Craft with love and beads.

title: Balloon Pop Carnival
description: Pop balloons at the carnival game to win prizes! Aim your darts carefully.

title: Morning Breakfast Chef
description: Cook a yummy breakfast to start the day right! Make toast, eggs, and juice.

title: Dance Reel Challenge
description: Create three different dance reels in one day! Show off your variety of moves.

title: Teacher's Helper
description: Help the Teacher organize the classroom! Collect supplies and tidy up.

title: Whiskers' Grooming Day
description: Give Whiskers a spa day! Brush fur, clean ears, and make kitty look fabulous.

title: Samosa Making Master
description: Learn to make crispy samosas filled with spiced potatoes! A delicious Indian snack.

title: Park Picnic Party
description: Organize a picnic in the park with all your friends! Bring food and blankets.

title: Bollywood Dance Star
description: Learn a classic Bollywood dance routine! Twirl, jump, and express with drama.

title: Diwali Sweets Shop
description: Visit the shop and buy traditional Diwali sweets! Ladoo, barfi, and jalebi await.

title: Racing Arcade Game
description: Play the racing game at the arcade and beat the fastest lap time!

title: Flower Crown Craft
description: Pick flowers from the garden and craft a beautiful flower crown to wear!

title: Science Fair Project
description: Create an amazing science project for the school fair! Impress the Teacher.

title: Cotton Candy Stand Helper
description: Help at the cotton candy stand! Spin fluffy pink and blue clouds of sweetness.

title: Bedtime Routine
description: Complete your bedtime routine! Brush teeth, change into pajamas, and get cozy.

title: Karate Green Belt Master
description: Train intensely and demonstrate perfect form to earn your green belt!

title: Friendship Photo Booth
description: Take fun photos with friends at the mall photo booth! Strike silly poses.

title: Mango Lassi Maker
description: Blend a refreshing mango lassi! Frooti-flavored smoothie for a hot day.

title: Duck Pond Carnival
description: Pick lucky ducks at the carnival game to win mystery prizes!

title: Water the Garden
description: Keep your garden healthy! Water all the plants and flowers.

title: Makeup Tutorial Reel
description: Film a makeup tutorial reel! Show how to apply lip gloss and eyeshadow.

title: Leo's Book Club
description: Join Leo for a cozy book reading session! Share stories and imagination.

title: Holi Water Balloon Fun
description: Fill water balloons with colored water and have a splash fight with friends!

title: Sparkle Nail Collection
description: Collect all the sparkle nail polish colors! Build your perfect collection.

title: Whack-a-Mole Champion
description: Beat the high score on the whack-a-mole arcade game! Quick reflexes needed.

title: Buddy's Trick Training
description: Teach Buddy the dog a new trick! Practice sit, roll over, or shake paw.

title: Pakora Cooking Class
description: Make crispy vegetable pakoras! A perfect rainy day snack with chai.

title: Swing Set Fun
description: Swing high at the playground! See how high you can go.

title: Rainbow Outfit Day
description: Create a rainbow-themed outfit! Wear something with every color.

title: Diwali Fireworks Show
description: Watch the beautiful Diwali fireworks display! Collect sparklers too.

title: Skee Ball Star
description: Roll balls up the ramp and score big points at skee ball!

title: Vegetable Garden Harvest
description: Harvest fresh vegetables from your garden! Tomatoes, carrots, and peppers.

title: Sleepover with Ava
description: Have a fun sleepover with Ava! Pillow fights, snacks, and staying up late.

title: Kata Practice Session
description: Practice your karate kata forms in the garden! Focus and breathe.

title: Jalebi Sweet Treat
description: Make swirly orange jalebis! Crispy, sweet, and soaked in syrup.

title: Dance Duet with Mia
description: Create a dance duet reel with artistic Mia! Combine moves and creativity.

title: Giant Stuffed Prize
description: Win the giant stuffed animal from the claw machine! The ultimate prize.

title: Spelling Bee Champion
description: Study hard and win the school spelling bee! Spell every word correctly.

title: Cotton's Carrot Garden
description: Plant and grow carrots especially for Cotton the bunny! Fresh and yummy.
